training_setup: depth=25, sims=400, all 4 seats LookaheadMcts (no max_seconds cap → engine 30k-step cap)

vp_source_breakdown.note: v1 engine: VP comes from settlements + cities only. No longest road, largest army, or dev cards. v2 must report broken-down VP sources.

interpretation: 41% timeout rate is the load-bearing data-quality issue identified in v1.
Median 4648 moves = stalled mid-games. Real Catan finishes in 60-100 player turns.
Margin=1 in 74% of finished games means winners barely got there.
v2 target: <5% timeout rate, median <800 moves, margin >=2 in >50% of games.
